---
title: "Word Bubble"
description: "Fun experiment with Quarto."
---

```{=html}
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
<title>Word Bubble Cloud</title>
<style>
  * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  body { font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; background: #fff; }

  .cloud {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    height: 500px;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .bubble {
    position: absolute;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    border-radius: 50%;
    font-weight: 500;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 6px;
    line-height: 1.2;
    cursor: default;
    user-select: none;
    opacity: 0;
    transform: scale(0);
    animation:
      popIn 0.7s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1) var(--delay) forwards,
      float var(--float-dur) ease-in-out var(--float-delay) infinite alternate;
    transition: transform 0.2s ease;
  }
  .bubble:hover { transform: scale(1.15) !important; z-index: 10; }

  @keyframes popIn {
    to { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
  }
  @keyframes float {
    from { translate: 0px 0px; }
    to   { translate: var(--dx) var(--dy); }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="cloud" id="cloud"></div>

<script>
// ── EDIT YOUR WORDS HERE ──────────────────────────────────────────
// Each entry: { text, size }
// size controls bubble diameter (px) — bigger = more prominent
const WORDS = [
  { text: 'Food',  size: 150 },
  { text: 'Final exam',    size: 130 },
  { text: 'NBA Finals',      size: 120 },
  { text: 'Camera on the next hike?',        size: 100 },
];
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const RAMPS = [
  { bg: '#EEEDFE', border: '#534AB7', text: '#3C3489' },
  { bg: '#E1F5EE', border: '#0F6E56', text: '#085041' },
  { bg: '#FAECE7', border: '#993C1D', text: '#4A1B0C' },
  { bg: '#FBEAF0', border: '#993556', text: '#4B1528' },
  { bg: '#E6F1FB', border: '#185FA5', text: '#042C53' },
  { bg: '#FAEEDA', border: '#854F0B', text: '#412402' },
  { bg: '#EAF3DE', border: '#3B6D11', text: '#173404' },
];

const cloud = document.getElementById('cloud');
const W = cloud.clientWidth;
const H = cloud.clientHeight;
const placed = [];

const sorted = [...WORDS].sort((a, b) => b.size - a.size);
const maxSize = sorted[0].size;

sorted.forEach((item, i) => {
  const c = RAMPS[i % RAMPS.length];
  const fontSize = Math.round(11 + (item.size / maxSize) * 14);

  const div = document.createElement('div');
  div.className = 'bubble';
  div.textContent = item.text;
  div.style.cssText = `
    width: ${item.size}px;
    height: ${item.size}px;
    font-size: ${fontSize}px;
    background: ${c.bg};
    border: 1.5px solid ${c.border};
    color: ${c.text};
    --delay: ${i * 0.1}s;
    --float-dur: ${3.5 + Math.random() * 2.5}s;
    --float-delay: -${Math.random() * 3}s;
    --dx: ${(Math.random() - 0.5) * 20}px;
    --dy: ${(Math.random() - 0.5) * 14}px;
  `;

  let x, y, tries = 0;
  do {
    x = Math.random() * (W - item.size);
    y = Math.random() * (H - item.size);
    tries++;
  } while (tries < 120 && placed.some(p => {
    const dx = (p.x + p.s / 2) - (x + item.size / 2);
    const dy = (p.y + p.s / 2) - (y + item.size / 2);
    return Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy) < (p.s + item.size) / 2 + 8;
  }));

  placed.push({ x, y, s: item.size });
  div.style.left = x + 'px';
  div.style.top  = y + 'px';
  cloud.appendChild(div);
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
```
